Grapes_Healthy.prevention: Continue regular monitoring, apply preventive sulfur spray every 14 days
Grapes_Healthy.message: No disease detected. Your grape plant is healthy and in excellent condition.

Grapes_Black Rot.treatment: Remove infected leaves and berries immediately. Apply fungicide every 7-10 days. Remove and destroy infected plant parts.
Grapes_Black Rot.prevention: Improve air circulation by pruning, avoid overhead watering, sanitize pruning tools, apply preventive sprays before infection occurs
Grapes_Black Rot.message: Black Rot disease detected. Immediate action required. Start fungicide treatment immediately.

Grapes_Black Measles.treatment: Apply fungicide to pruning wounds immediately after pruning. Remove severely affected vines. Prune during dry season only.
Grapes_Black Measles.prevention: Prune only during dry periods, apply fungicide to wounds immediately after pruning, remove and destroy infected wood, avoid stress conditions
symptoms: Leaves show tiger-stripe or mottled pattern
causes: Complex fungal infection (Phaeomoniella chlamydospora, Phaeoacremonium spp.)
Grapes_Black Measles.message: Esca (Black Measles) detected - this is a serious fungal disease. Professional intervention strongly recommended.

Grapes_Isariopsis Leaf Spot.treatment: Remove infected leaves, improve air circulation, apply fungicide every 10-14 days, use sulfur as preventive measure
Grapes_Isariopsis Leaf Spot.prevention: Maintain proper spacing for air circulation, avoid overhead watering, apply sulfur or copper fungicides preventively, remove fallen leaves
Grapes_Isariopsis Leaf Spot.message: Leaf Blight detected. Start fungicide treatment. Improve vineyard air circulation.

Brinjal_Healthy.prevention: Continue regular monitoring, maintain proper spacing, ensure good air circulation
Brinjal_Healthy.message: No disease detected. Your brinjal plant is healthy and in excellent condition.

Brinjal_Little_Leaf.medicine: Zinc Sulfate (0.5%) foliar spray or Borax solution; Imidacloprid 17.8SL (1ml/L)
Brinjal_Little_Leaf.treatment: Spray zinc sulfate solution 2-3 times at 10-15 day intervals. Control insect vectors (whiteflies, mites). Remove severely affected plants.
Brinjal_Little_Leaf.prevention: Use resistant varieties, control whiteflies and spider mites with insecticides, improve plant nutrition, ensure proper zinc availability
Brinjal_Little_Leaf.message: Little Leaf disease detected. This is a serious condition. Apply zinc sulfate spray and control insect vectors.

Brinjal_Leaf_Spot.treatment: Remove infected leaves immediately. Apply fungicide every 10-14 days. Maintain good air circulation. Remove and destroy infected plant parts.
Brinjal_Leaf_Spot.prevention: Improve air circulation through proper spacing, avoid overhead watering, sanitize tools, apply preventive sprays, remove fallen leaves
symptoms: Brown or dark spots with concentric rings
Brinjal_Leaf_Spot.message: Leaf Spot disease detected. Apply fungicide treatment and improve air circulation.

Brinjal_Blight.medicine: Metalaxyl + Mancozeb 75% WP or Phosphonite fungicide
Brinjal_Blight.treatment: Remove severely affected plants. Apply fungicide immediately. Improve drainage. Reduce irrigation frequency. Apply every 7-10 days.
Brinjal_Blight.prevention: Use resistant varieties, ensure proper drainage, avoid excessive watering, improve air circulation, apply preventive fungicides during rainy season
Brinjal_Blight.message: Blight disease detected. This is serious. Improve drainage immediately and apply fungicide.
